name: Enchiladas (Red Chili)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the corn tortillas in deep fat until softened.
2. Immerse the tortillas in the chili sauce and place on a warm oven-proof plate.
3. Sprinkle with grated cheese and chopped onion.
4. Cover with red chili sauce and place another tortilla on top.
5. Repeat steps 3-4 two more times.
6. Pour enough chili sauce over the stack to cover the tortillas completely.
7. Three tortillas make one serving.
8. A fried egg is traditional on top of each enchilada.
